moduleDescription: Open type and semi-hermetic compressor servicing.
learningOutcome: Dismantle, repair and assemble commercial compressors.
assessmentCriteria: Dismantle, repair and assemble commercial compressors.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Identifying and labeling compressor parts
Dismantling semi-hermetic compressor mechanical assembly
Inspecting and replacing valves, gaskets, and pistons
Assembling, oil charging, and pressure leak testing
Electrical insulation (megger) & pump test

moduleDescription: Condenser servicing, descaling and cooling tower maintenance.
learningOutcome: Maintain water-cooled condensers and cooling towers.
assessmentCriteria: Maintain water-cooled condensers and cooling towers.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Cleaning tube-in-tube and shell-and-tube condensers
Executing chemical and mechanical descaling operations
Cleaning and servicing cooling tower sump, fills, and nozzles
Inspecting float valve and adjusting water level
Testing water flow rate and checking for fan alignment

moduleDescription: Water softeners, regeneration and circulating water treatment.
learningOutcome: Service and maintain water treatment systems.
assessmentCriteria: Service and maintain water treatment systems.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Testing water hardness, pH, and TDS levels
Servicing water softening plants and valves
Executing brine regeneration procedure
Adding scale/corrosion inhibitors to circulating water
Adhering to safety rules in handling water chemicals

moduleDescription: Expansion valves, flooded evaporators and chillers.
learningOutcome: Install and adjust refrigerant flow devices.
assessmentCriteria: Install and adjust refrigerant flow devices.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Setting and adjusting Thermostatic Expansion Valves (TEV)
Installing and testing electronic expansion valves (EEV)
Servicing flooded evaporators and low side controls
Superheat calculation and adjustment
Safe installation practices and leak checking

moduleDescription: Water coolers, bottle coolers, visi coolers and deep freezers.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Servicing storage and pressure type water coolers
Troubleshooting visi-coolers and chest deep freezers
Testing defrost cycles and fan motor controls
Replacing door gaskets and checking thermal insulation
Gas charging and testing cooling performance parameters

moduleDescription: Ice cube machines, ice plants and ice candy plants.
learningOutcome: Install, repair and maintain ice-making equipment.
assessmentCriteria: Install, repair and maintain ice-making equipment.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Checking water harvest and spray mechanism in cube ice machine
Testing electrical timers and hot gas defrost solenoids
Preparing and maintaining brine solution density in ice plants
Inspecting ice cans and harvester mechanisms
Preventive maintenance tasks and safety checklist

moduleDescription: Walk-in coolers, cold rooms and preventive maintenance.
learningOutcome: Service cold storage and maintain performance.
assessmentCriteria: Service cold storage and maintain performance.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Inspecting wall panel joints and door heater operation
Testing evaporator coils and defrost systems
Checking oil separators and crankcase heaters
Evaluating temperature and humidity levels inside cold room
Performing weekly preventive maintenance checklist

moduleDescription: Psychrometrics, airflow measurement and HVAC principles.
learningOutcome: Measure air properties and evaluate HVAC performance.
assessmentCriteria: Measure air properties and evaluate HVAC performance.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Using Sling Psychrometer/Anemometers correctly
Plotting state points on Psychrometric chart
Measuring Dry Bulb, Wet Bulb, RH, Dew Point
Calculating airflow (CFM) and duct static pressure
Safety in using testing instruments

moduleDescription: Fan motors, blowers, ducts and insulation.
learningOutcome: Install and maintain air distribution systems.
assessmentCriteria: Install and maintain air distribution systems.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Servicing blower assembly and checking belt tension
Connecting and testing fan speed controllers
Fabricating and joining simple duct segments
Applying acoustic and thermal duct insulation
Adjusting dampers for proper air balancing

moduleDescription: Air filter servicing and indoor air quality improvement.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Identifying and cleaning different air filters
Measuring pressure drop across filters
Replacing HEPA and carbon filters correctly
Checking fresh air intake and exhaust dampers
Adhering to safety during filter disposal

moduleDescription: Air-cooled and water-cooled package AC systems.
learningOutcome: Install and troubleshoot package air conditioners.
assessmentCriteria: Install and troubleshoot package air conditioners.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Levelling and placing package AC units
Duct connection and sealing at unit flange
Wiring control circuits and thermostat controls
Troubleshooting high pressure / low pressure trips
Checking overall cooling efficiency and parameters

moduleDescription: AHU, FCU, condensers, cooling towers and chilled water systems.
learningOutcome: Service and maintain central air conditioning plants.
assessmentCriteria: Service and maintain central air conditioning plants.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Servicing Air Handling Units (AHU) and Fan Coil Units (FCU)
Inspecting chilled water pumps and adjusting valves
Testing control panel wiring and interlocking sequence
Servicing high capacity condenser water systems
Adhering to heavy machinery safety protocols

moduleDescription: Direct Expansion systems and chilled water plants.
learningOutcome: Diagnose and maintain DX and chiller systems.
assessmentCriteria: Diagnose and maintain DX and chiller systems.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Operating shell-and-tube water chillers
Checking freeze protection controls and flow switches
Comparing performance of DX vs Flooded chillers
Troubleshooting low suction and high head pressure faults
Logging chiller operational parameters

moduleDescription: VRF/VRV components, piping, commissioning and servicing.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Identifying branch joints and headers layout
Performing nitrogen pressure leakage test (40+ bar)
Commissioning VRF systems using service software
Troubleshooting indoor-outdoor communication errors
Executing oil recovery cycle and parameters check

moduleDescription: Bus and train air conditioning systems.
learningOutcome: Maintain and troubleshoot heavy vehicle air conditioning.
assessmentCriteria: Maintain and troubleshoot heavy vehicle air conditioning.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Identifying roof-mounted package unit components on bus/train
Testing open drive compressor belt coupling and clutch
Checking vibration dampers and rubber hose condition
Troubleshooting DC control voltage electrical faults
Adhering to transport safety and high-voltage precautions

moduleDescription: Preventive maintenance schedules and log book management.
learningOutcome: Perform preventive maintenance and maintain operational records.
assessmentCriteria: Perform preventive maintenance and maintain operational records.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Designing daily/weekly/monthly PM schedules
Proper logging of suction, discharge, oil, water temp/pressures
Detecting abnormal noise, vibration, or temperature trends
Executing shutdown and start-up checklists correctly
Maintaining plant safety records and lockout-tagout (LOTO)

moduleDescription: Advanced engineering drawing, calculations and applied science.
learningOutcome: Interpret engineering drawings and solve technical calculations.
assessmentCriteria: Interpret engineering drawings and solve technical calculations.

evalutionsPoints.evaluation: Interpreting complex centralized AC duct layout plans
Reading control circuit interlocking diagrams
Calculating plant cooling capacity (TR) and heat load
Applying coefficient of performance (COP) and EER calculations
Understanding refrigerant enthalpy and Mollier diagrams
